docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY SHAHER, AHMED AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, PATRIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AHMED SHAHER DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT PATRIC STEELE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
